items.title: Sync Upstream Docs for API Spec Updates in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This PR focuses on synchronizing the latest updates from the upstream Docs with our API specifications. Key changes include the addition of the chirp-v5-5 model and adjustments to various tests. Ensuring our repo aligns with these updates will enhance consistency and functionality across all downstream repositories.

items.title: Sync verification complete for NanoBananaCli in Nano Banana Cli 🚀
items.summary: The sync check confirms that NanoBananaCli is fully aligned with the latest Docs specification. Recent updates to the documentation did not affect the `nano-banana.json` file, ensuring no code changes were necessary. All models, aspect ratios, resolutions, endpoints, and request parameters match perfectly.

items.title: MCPSerp is fully in sync with openapi/serp.json in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: A recent sync check confirmed that the MCPSerp repository is fully aligned with the openapi/serp.json specification. Key endpoints and parameters were verified, showing no discrepancies. This ensures that all functionalities remain intact and up to date.

items.title: Enhance CLI to Match OpenAPI Spec with New Features in Seedance Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the CLI with the OpenAPI specification by introducing a `content` array format and renaming the `aspect_ratio` field to `ratio`. Several new optional parameters have been added, enhancing the flexibility of command usage. Additionally, various fixes have been implemented to improve functionality and reduce duplication in the codebase.

items.title: Revamp CLI to Align with New Luma API Spec in Luma Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the CLI with the latest Luma API specifications by removing the `model` parameter and introducing new fields such as `loop`, `enhancement`, and distinct `start_image_url`/`end_image_url` for images. Key commands have been modified to reflect these changes, enhancing usability and functionality. Additionally, several constants and commands related to models have been removed to streamline the codebase.

items.title: Enhance video generation tools with new parameters in M C P Seedance 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces two new parameters, `frames` and `execution_expires_after`, to the video generation tools. The `frames` parameter allows for precise frame count specification, while `execution_expires_after` sets a timeout threshold for tasks. Additionally, mutual exclusivity between `frames` and `duration` is enforced, ensuring proper payload handling and error management.

items.title: Fix payload field and add adaptive resolution in Seedream Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves discrepancies between the CLI and OpenAPI spec by correcting the payload field from `resolution` to `size`. Additionally, the `adaptive` resolution option has been introduced, enhancing the flexibility of image generation. The changes also include updates to the resolution display and test assertions to reflect the new options.

items.title: Syncing with Latest API Spec in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This PR aims to synchronize the MCPLuma repository with the latest updates from the upstream Docs API specification. Key changes include updates to models, endpoints, and parameters, ensuring consistency across all components. The sync process will follow the detailed instructions provided in the repository.

items.title: Revamp Video Parameters to Align with OpenAPI Spec in Sora Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the `/sora/videos` endpoint schema with the CLI, introducing new parameters and validating existing ones. Key changes include updated `--size` and `--duration` options, along with the addition of `--version`, `--character-url`, `--character-start`, and `--character-end`. These enhancements improve user experience and ensure compliance with the latest API specifications.

items.title: Exciting New Model and Aspect Ratio Added in Veo Cli 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces the `veo31-fast-ingredient` model and a new portrait aspect ratio of `9:16` to the CLI. Key changes include updates to the output module, README, and tests to accommodate these additions. Users can now generate videos using the new model and aspect ratio seamlessly.

items.title: MCPFlux is now fully verified with the latest flux.json spec in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: The verification process confirmed that MCPFlux is in complete alignment with the latest flux.json specifications. Key findings include that the `FluxModel` matches the required models, and all necessary endpoints and parameters are fully covered. No code changes were needed, ensuring the repository remains in sync and functional.

items.title: Enhance NanoBanana with New Model Support in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `nano-banana-2` model to the NanoBanana suite, enhancing the existing options with pro-level quality at flash speed. The `NanoBananaModel` type has been updated to include this new model, and field descriptions for the `model` parameter in both `nanobanana_generate_image` and `nanobanana_edit_image` functions have been revised to reflect these changes. This enhancement aims to improve user experience and flexibility in image generation.

items.title: Update video mode to comply with API specs in M C P Midjourney 🎥
items.summary: This update restricts the video generation modes to only 'fast' and 'turbo' as per the API specifications. The changes include the introduction of a new `VideoMode` type and adjustments in the video tools to ensure type safety. All other endpoints are already aligned with the current spec, ensuring a smooth user experience.

items.title: Mainnet SAP Registration Now Live in O O B E Integration 🚀
items.summary: We've successfully added mainnet support to the SAP registration script, allowing AceDataCloud to register on the Solana mainnet. This update includes the introduction of a new command for mainnet registration and enhancements to the registration process, ensuring a smoother experience for users. Key components such as Agent PDA and various indexes have also been integrated.

items.title: Repo Sync Verified: No Changes Needed in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: The recent updates in the upstream Docs did not affect the Seedream spec, confirming that `openapi/seedream.json` remains unchanged. A thorough verification against the current code showed all components are in sync and functioning as expected. No code modifications are required at this time.

items.title: Clean Up Orientation Details in M C P Sora 📽️
items.summary: This update removes the unsupported `square` orientation from the documentation and tool descriptions. Key changes include updates to the README and video tool scripts, ensuring that only valid orientations (`landscape` and `portrait`) are mentioned. This enhances clarity and aligns the documentation with the API specifications.

items.title: Chirp-v5-5 Model Sync Verified in Suno Cli 🚀
items.summary: The `chirp-v5-5` model is confirmed to be in sync with the latest Docs specifications. Key checks include its presence in `SUNO_MODELS`, implementation of all 12 API endpoints, and successful passing of all tests. No code changes were necessary, ensuring the repository remains up to date.

items.title: Updated Available Models with chirp-v3-0 in Skills 🎉
items.summary: This update syncs the `suno-music/SKILL.md` file with the latest OpenAPI spec from AceDataCloud. The `chirp-v3-0` model has been added to the Available Models table, ensuring that all relevant models are accurately represented. All other skills remain in sync with the documentation.

items.title: Sync verification complete with no changes needed in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: The recent verification confirmed that the MCPVeo is in sync with the Docs, with no drift found. All 14 tests passed successfully, ensuring that the API specifications remain intact. Key components like `VeoModel`, `VideoResolution`, and `AspectRatio` were all validated without any required code changes.

items.title: Sync latest chirp-v5-5 model updates in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the new `chirp-v5-5` model into the MCP server, reflecting the latest changes from the Suno API. Key modifications include updates to the model table, README documentation, and integration tests to ensure the new model is recognized. This enhances the overall model offerings and improves recommendations for users.

items.title: Sync model updates by removing chirp-v5-5 in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the `chirp-v5-5` model from the codebase to align with the current upstream Docs specification. Key changes include updates to `core/types.py`, `tools/info_tools.py`, `README.md`, and `tests/test_integration.py`, ensuring that the model list and documentation reflect the latest available models. The current model enum now includes `chirp-v5`, `chirp-v4-5-plus`, and others, enhancing clarity for users.

items.title: Sync Up with New Chirp Model in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the MCP server with the latest upstream Docs specification by adding the `chirp-v5-5` model. Key changes include updates to the model enum in `core/types.py`, enhancements to the model table in `tools/info_tools.py`, and modifications to the README and integration tests to reflect this new addition. Overall, this ensures users have access to the newest model features and capabilities.

items.title: Streamline Model Selection by Removing chirp-v5-5 in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: The `chirp-v5-5` model has been removed from the codebase following its removal from the upstream OpenAPI spec. Key updates include modifications to `core/types.py`, `tools/info_tools.py`, and the `README.md`, promoting `chirp-v5` as the top-tier model. This change simplifies model selection and enhances clarity for users.

items.title: Enhance SunoModel with chirp-v5-5 in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates `chirp-v5-5` into the SunoModel, ensuring it aligns with the latest OpenAPI specifications. Key changes include updates to the model table in the documentation and the addition of `chirp-v5-5` to the available models list. This enhancement improves user access to the latest model version, promoting better quality outputs.

items.title: Enhance Publish Workflow with Metadata Support in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update upgrades Twine in the publish workflow to version 6.1.0, enabling support for Python package metadata 2.4. It introduces a twine check before uploads to ensure clearer error signals for metadata issues. Additionally, it allows various publishing processes to run concurrently after the build, improving overall efficiency.

items.title: Remove chirp-v5-5 model references in M C P Suno 🎶
items.summary: This update removes all references to the `chirp-v5-5` model from the codebase following its removal from the upstream Suno OpenAPI specification. Key changes include updates to model tables, descriptions, and integration tests to ensure consistency with the available models. The `chirp-v5` model is now highlighted as the recommended option for users.

items.title: Enhance error handling for OpenAI requests in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves error recording for failed OpenAI requests by ensuring that actual error payloads are preserved in gateway usage entries. It also prevents embeddings records from overwriting stored error bodies and includes focused unit tests to validate these changes. Overall, this enhances the reliability and transparency of error handling in the Platform Service.

items.title: Enhance veo video generation with retry logic in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a retry mechanism for veo video generation polling, allowing up to two retries if a timeout occurs. The `_pollVeoTask` method has been extracted for better reusability, and only `TimeoutError` will trigger a retry, while other errors will be thrown immediately. This change effectively extends the maximum wait time for video generation to approximately 90 minutes.

items.title: Automate Docs Sync and Merging in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automated synchronization from the Docs repository, enhancing workflow efficiency. Key additions include a new sync-from-docs workflow that triggers on updates and an auto-merge workflow for bot-created pull requests. Additionally, instructions for using Claude Code have been added to streamline the syncing process.

items.title: Enhance Sync Workflow with Downstream Dispatch in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a downstream dispatch job to the Docs sync workflow, triggering repository_dispatch events for downstream repositories like MCP, CLI, API, and Skills after a successful sync from PlatformBackend. It ensures that only the repositories with actual changes are notified, improving efficiency and relevance of updates.

items.title: Enhance Suno OpenAPI with chirp-v5-5 model in Docs 🎉
items.summary: This update adds the chirp-v5-5 model to the Suno OpenAPI specification model enum. Additionally, the example has been updated to reflect this new model, ensuring that users have the latest options available for generating music audio.

items.title: Updated default model to chirp-v5-5 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: The default model for SUNO has been updated from chirp-v5 to chirp-v5-5 in the constants file. This change enhances the model's performance and capabilities. The update involves a minor modification in the source code, ensuring smoother functionality moving forward.

items.title: Update Suno Agent for Chirp-v5-5 in Copilot Plus 🎶
items.summary: The Suno MCP agent documentation has been updated to reference the chirp-v5-5 model. This change ensures that users are informed about the latest model capabilities for AI music generation. The update includes a minor modification in the docstring for clarity.

items.title: Enhance suno-music with chirp-v5-5 model in Skills 🎶
items.summary: The suno-music skill has been updated to include the chirp-v5-5 model in the SKILL.md model table. This addition enhances the options available for users, ensuring access to the latest and highest quality audio processing capabilities.

items.title: Exciting New Model: Chirp V5.5 Support Added in Suno Cli 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for the new Suno chirp-v5-5 model in SunoCli. Key changes include adding chirp-v5-5 to the SUNO_MODELS list, updating the model display in the output, and modifying the README and tests to ensure proper integration. Users can now leverage the latest model for enhanced performance.

items.title: Enhance model mapping with chirp-v5-5 for Suno provider in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the mapping for the chirp-v5-5 model to the suno_v55 in the nebula worker's core.ts file. This change enhances the model compatibility for the Suno provider, ensuring better performance and functionality. The modification includes a single addition to the existing model mappings.

items.title: Enhance API with User Avatars in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update adds an avatar field to the platform rank API response, allowing the frontend to display user avatars in the ranking table and podium. The change enhances the user experience by providing a more personalized view of rankings.

items.title: Exciting New Support for chirp-v5-5 in Backend 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces support for the chirp-v5-5 model in Suno's audio pricing and OpenAPI enums. Comprehensive documentation has been added in both English and Chinese, detailing the new model's capabilities. Additionally, focused API cost coverage for billing paths related to chirp-v5-5 has been implemented, enhancing the overall functionality.

items.title: Revert draft URL handling for daily publish limit in Publisher 🚫
items.summary: This update reverts a previous change that allowed returning a draft URL instead of raising an error when the daily publish limit is reached. The modification affects the error handling in the Baijiahao publishing process, ensuring that a PublishError is raised instead of providing a draft URL. This change aims to maintain stricter error reporting for publishing constraints.

items.title: Revamp Suno Version Comparison Table in Docs 🚀
items.summary: The Suno version comparison table in the simplified Chinese guide has been updated to reflect the new v5.5/mv layout. Additionally, the traditional Chinese guide has been synchronized to match the same table structure and values. A follow-up sentence has also been refreshed to align with the latest v5.5 release information.

items.title: Enhance Baijiahao Error Handling in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the Baijiahao publishing logic to return a draft URL instead of raising an error when a daily publish limit is reached. The change prevents loss of the draft URL and improves the overall user experience by allowing users to access their saved drafts. The code now checks for specific error messages and responds accordingly.

items.title: Enhance documentation with chirp-v5-5 model support in Suno API 🚀
items.summary: This update adds references for the chirp-v5-5 model to the SunoAPI documentation and README. Key changes include the addition of chirp-v5-5 to the model version table and updates to the introduction and comparison tables to highlight this latest model. These enhancements improve clarity for users integrating with the Suno API.

items.title: Enhance Suno Documentation with chirp-v5-5 Model in Docs 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the chirp-v5-5 model to the Suno documentation, ensuring users have the latest information. Key changes include updates to model version tables in both English and Chinese, as well as the model parameter lists. The announcement text has also been revised to highlight chirp-v5-5 as the newest model available.

items.title: Exciting New Support for Chirp V5.5 Model in M C P Suno 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces support for the new Suno chirp-v5-5 model, enhancing the capabilities of our music generation tools. Key changes include updates to the model types, tool descriptions, and integration tests to ensure chirp-v5-5 is recognized as the best option for longer songs. The README and info tools have also been updated to reflect these enhancements.

items.title: Enhance Suno with chirp-v5-5 Model Support in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces support for the new chirp-v5-5 model in the ttapi worker. Key changes include adding chirp-v5-5 to model validation arrays, outgoing request mappings, and response mappings. This enhancement improves the functionality and versatility of the Suno audio processing capabilities.

items.title: Enhance Toutiao URL Extraction and Modal Handling in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the resilience of the `extract_url` and `close_modal` functions against DOM changes in Toutiao. The `close_modal` function now uses a more flexible class matching strategy, while `extract_url` has been restructured to utilize a cascading selector approach. Additionally, the wait time for article pages has been increased, and helper functions have been extracted for better code reuse.

items.title: Enhance Suno Support with Chirp v5.5 in Platform Service 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces support for the chirp-v5-5 model in the openaihk Suno audio handler. Key changes include mapping chirp-v5-5 to the upstream chirp-fenix model alias and ensuring consistency across various request flows. The modifications enhance the functionality and flexibility of the audio processing capabilities.

items.title: Enhance LLMs.txt Accessibility in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new alias for `/.well-known/llms.txt` in the Nginx configuration, ensuring compliance with the llmstxt.org specification. Additionally, the `robots.txt` file has been modified to include a proper `Sitemap:` directive for the LLMs.txt reference, improving machine-readability and search engine indexing.

items.title: Enhance AI Discoverability with New Nginx Route in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Nginx proxy route at `/.well-known/llms.txt`, complementing the existing `/llms.txt` route. This addition aligns with the llmstxt.org specification, enhancing discoverability for AI search engines. The change involves a modification to the `nginx.conf.template`, ensuring both routes are effectively proxied to the PlatformBackend.

items.title: Enhance LLMs.txt Accessibility in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new route for `/.well-known/llms.txt` and modifies the `robots.txt` file to include a machine-readable reference to LLMs.txt. The changes ensure compliance with the llmstxt.org specification, improving discoverability for crawlers and AI bots. The `Sitemap:` directive now properly points to both the sitemap and LLMs.txt, enhancing overall SEO and accessibility.

items.title: Enhance AI Crawler Support for Better Discoverability in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update adds various AI search engine User-Agent patterns to the nginx prerender UA map, ensuring that AI crawlers receive fully rendered HTML instead of an empty SPA shell. Key additions include UAs from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, which will enhance the visibility of our pages to AI-powered search engines. The implementation incurs zero runtime cost while improving Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

items.title: Automate AI Issue Triage and PR Merging in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two new automated workflows for issue triage and PR merging. The 'auto-triage-issues' workflow identifies unassigned open issues and assigns them to Copilot, while the 'auto-merge-ai-prs' workflow merges AI-generated PRs that have passed all CI checks. These enhancements streamline the management of issues and pull requests, improving overall efficiency.

items.title: Fix(csdn): regenerate HTML after image processing to prevent image transfer failures in Publisher 🐛
